name: Sponge Taffy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a saucepan and place over medium heat.
2. Stir until all sugar dissolves before boiling begins.
3. Cook to 290°F on a candy thermometer.
4. Remove from heat and, when bubbling ceases, add baking soda.
5. When the mixture effervesces, pour into a square cake pan that has been well chilled but not greased.
6. Allow the taffy to rise until it sets in a cold place.
7. Turn out onto a plate and cut with a small saw for clean pieces.
NOTE: This recipe comes from a candy manufacturer who specializes in sponge taffy. If you follow all instructions, success is guaranteed. Use a candy thermometer to ensure accuracy when making any type of candy; years of experience are needed to judge by sight alone.
